top_signals.title: Brent oil price posts biggest monthly loss in six years as market counts on a U.S.-Iran deal
top_signals.summary: Oil prices fell Friday after President Trump said he would meet in the White House Situation Room to make a final decision about a deal with Iran.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: NYC’s Mamdani Mimics Trump, Musk DOGE With COGE Plan
top_signals.summary: Bloomberg's Nacha Cattan joins Katie Greifeld on "Bloomberg Real Yield." New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani said he’s forming a new Commission of Government Efficiency, or COGE, to improve the way City Hall spends public funds.  (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Dan Ives: Anthropic’s growth is 'just the tip of the spear' for AI rally
top_signals.summary: Ives' comments come as part of a wider prediction for the Nasdaq to top 30,000 points by 2027, reiterating his call from earlier interviews with CNBC.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Hedge Funds Are Bearish on Natural Gas for First Time Since 2024
top_signals.summary: Hedge funds turned bearish on US natural gas for the first time since 2024 on signs of plentiful domestic supplies and expectations of reduced export needs.

top_signals.title: Japan passes bill to raise co-payments for prescription drugs similar to OTC counterparts
top_signals.summary: The health ministry plans to require individuals to bear additional costs for some 1,100 over-the-counter-like prescription drugs starting in March 2027.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Why is Stellar's XLM up by over 50% this week?
top_signals.summary: XLM rallied after US financial giant DTCC announced a partnership with the Stellar Network, but it still risks a sharp downside in the coming weeks.

top_signals.title: Wintermute extends trading infrastructure into prediction markets
top_signals.summary: Wintermute extends trading infrastructure into prediction markets as multibillion-dollar sector draws institutional liquidity providers.
